response.step_by_step_log: 1. Watched the video and identified the main song "虎狼来" from on-screen text. 2. Identified the performers as Ouro Kronii and Tokino Sora. 3. Used the search tool to find the original artist of "虎狼来", which is Eve. 4. Retrieved the lyrics for "虎狼来" by Eve. 5. Mapped the scenes: 00:00-02:08 for the song, and 02:08-end for the dialogue. 6. Constructed the final JSON response.
response.global_summary: The video features a performance of the song "虎狼来" (Kororon) by Ouro Kronii and Tokino Sora, followed by an interview segment.

scenes.description: Ouro Kronii and Tokino Sora perform the song "虎狼来" (Kororon). Original music by Eve.
